subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! God willing, mayest thou ever remain adorned with the mantle of love for the Eternal Beloved, and be turned towards His horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله انشاء الله لازال بطراز محبت محبوب بیزوال مزین باشی و بافقش متوجه اگر
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @goodly deeds; actions, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @effort; striving, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
